boom_patches_applied.why: IssueUnitBanked leaves rob_head/rob_pnr_idx unconnected; without this firtool fails to elaborate LargeBoomV4Config
matrix issue unit hangs at runtime; upstream falls back to the collapsing issue unit (useMatrixIssue=false). Without it BOOM v4 elaborates and lints but the pipeline hangs in simulation.

contents.meta/: FIRRTL (.fir.gz), device tree (.dts), firrtl annotations, SRAM conf, regmaps, module graph
contents.chipyard.harness.TestHarness.MediumBoomV: filelist: ChipTop SoC (the DUT). NOTE: does not list the SRAM models.
contents.sim_files.common.f: filelist: everything needed to simulate (includes top.mems.v)

notes: SRAMs are behavioral models in chipyard.harness.TestHarness.MediumBoomV4Config.top.mems.v (firtool --repl-seq-mem). Fine for simulation/formal; not synthesizable to a PDK without SRAM replacement.
chipyard's top.f omits top.mems.v; flat/ appends it so the single file elaborates standalone. If you compile from rtl/ + a filelist, use sim_files.common.f, not top.f alone.
flat/ excludes .cc verilator shims and the TestHarness/TestDriver.
Paths in the .f files are rewritten relative to this config directory.
Verified: verilator --lint-only --top-module ChipTop on flat/ reports 0 errors.

simulation.tests_run: rv64ui-p-{add,simple,lw,sw,beq,jal}, rv64um-p-{mul,div}, rv64ua-p-amoadd_w, rv64uf-p-fadd, rv64ud-p-fadd, rv64mi-p-csr, rv64si-p-csr, rv64uc-p-rvc
simulation.note: Simulated from this exact frozen RTL (gen-collateral md5 verified identical to rtl/). Uses the collapsing issue unit after the two BOOM patches.
